name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn, it

(* State can be "idle", "trying", or "critical" *)
State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

(* Initialization: all processes are idle, turn is arbitrary *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Transition relation: each process can move from idle to trying,
   from trying to critical if it's its turn, and from critical to idle *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          \/ /\ state[i] = "idle"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
          \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
             /\ turn = i
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
          \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

(* Mutual exclusion: no two processes can be in critical section simultaneously *)
MutualExclusion == \A i, j \in 1..N: i /= j => ~(state[i] = "critical" /\ state[j] = "critical")

(* Liveness: if a process is trying, it will eventually enter critical section *)
Liveness == \A i \in 1..N: state[i] = "trying" => <> (state[i] = "critical")

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, participants, coordinator
VARIABLES decision, state, votes

        /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "None"]
        /\ decision = "None"

Prepare(p) == /\ state[p] = "Init"
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision>>

VoteYes(p) == /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Yes"]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<state, decision>>

VoteNo(p) == /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
             /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "No"]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<state, decision>>

Commit(p) == /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision>>

Abort(p) == /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision>>

CoordinatorDecision == /\ decision = "None"
                      /\ decision' = IF \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "Yes"
                                      THEN "Commit"

                      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

Next == \/ \E p \in participants: Prepare(p)
        \/ \E p \in participants: VoteYes(p)
        \/ \E p \in participants: VoteNo(p)
        \/ \E p \in participants: Commit(p)
        \/ \E p \in participants: Abort(p)
        \/ CoordinatorDecision

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ state \in [participants -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ votes \in [participants -> {"Yes", "No", "None"}]
          /\ decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "None"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

\* State variables
VARIABLES forks, states

\* Type invariant
TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]  \* fork i is owned by philosopher forks[i]
    /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

\* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking, forks are free
Init == 
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]  \* fork i is free (owned by philosopher i)
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

\* Helper predicates
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* Action: philosopher i picks up left fork
PickLeft(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "hungry"
    /\ forks[i] = i  \* left fork is free
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i]  \* philosopher i owns left fork
    /\ UNCHANGED states

\* Action: philosopher i picks up right fork
PickRight(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "hungry"
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)  \* right fork is free
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Right(i)] = i]  \* philosopher i owns right fork
    /\ UNCHANGED states

\* Action: philosopher i starts eating
StartEating(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "hungry"
    /\ forks[i] = i  \* left fork is owned by philosopher i
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = i  \* right fork is owned by philosopher i
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    /\ UNCHANGED forks

\* Action: philosopher i puts down left fork
PutLeft(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks[i] = i  \* left fork is owned by philosopher i
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i]  \* left fork is free
    /\ UNCHANGED states

\* Action: philosopher i puts down right fork
PutRight(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = i  \* right fork is owned by philosopher i
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]  \* right fork is free
    /\ UNCHANGED states

\* Action: philosopher i stops eating
StopEating(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks[i] = i  \* left fork is owned by philosopher i
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = i  \* right fork is owned by philosopher i
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    /\ UNCHANGED forks

\* Next-state relation
Next == 
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: PickLeft(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: PickRight(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: StartEating(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: PutLeft(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: PutRight(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: StopEating(i)

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat, N > 0

VARIABLES num, flag

vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ LET maxNum == MAX(num)
             IN flag[i] = TRUE
                /\ num[i] = maxNum + 1
                /\ flag[i] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

THEOREM MutualExclusion == Spec => []~(num[1] > 0 /\ num[2] > 0)   -- medium
---- MODULE End ----

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 1
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ \A i \in 1..K: q[i] \in {0,1}

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = {}
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                            /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
                            /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
                            /\ readers' = readers \cup {r}
                            /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
                            /\ readers' = readers
                            /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
     /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                            /\ readers' = readers
                            /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ readers \subseteq 1..100
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

name: Token Ring
Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == <<store>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  \/ /\ op = "Put"
     /\ k \in Keys
     /\ v \in Values
     /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ /\ op = "Get"
     /\ k \in Keys
     /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ Keys \subseteq [1..MaxKey]
  /\ Values \subseteq [1..MaxValue]
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosen -> FALSE, value -> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosen -> FALSE, value -> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> [chosen -> FALSE, value -> NULL]]

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosen = FALSE
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [maxBallot -> b]]
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [proposers[p] EXCEPT !.chosen = FALSE]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosen = FALSE
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [maxBallot -> b]]
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [proposers[p] EXCEPT !.chosen = FALSE]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosen = FALSE
  /\ proposers[p].value = v
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [chosen -> TRUE, value -> v]]
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [proposers[p] EXCEPT !.chosen = FALSE]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Chosen(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosen = FALSE
  /\ proposers[p].value = v
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [proposers[p] EXCEPT !.chosen = TRUE]]
  /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [chosen -> TRUE, value -> v]]

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : Prepare(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : Promise(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : Accept(p, b, v)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : Chosen(p, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot : Nat, chosen : BOOLEAN, value : V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot : Nat, chosen : BOOLEAN, value : V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ chosen \in [1..N -> [chosen : BOOLEAN, value : V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> acceptors[i].maxBallot, chosen -> acceptors[i].chosen, value -> acceptors[i].value]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> proposers[i].maxBallot, chosen -> proposers[i].chosen, value -> proposers[i].value]]
  /\ chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> [chosen -> chosen[i].chosen, value -> chosen[i].value]]
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> acceptors'[i].maxBallot, chosen -> acceptors'[i].chosen, value -> acceptors'[i].value]]
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> proposers'[i].maxBallot, chosen -> proposers'[i].chosen, value -> proposers'[i].value]]
  /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..N |-> [chosen -> chosen'[i].chosen, value -> chosen'[i].value]]
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> acceptors'[i].maxBallot, chosen -> acceptors'[i].chosen, value -> acceptors'[i].value]]
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> proposers'[i].maxBallot, chosen -> proposers'[i].chosen, value -> proposers'[i].value]]

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = Seq(1..FILE_SIZE) \* File represented as a sequence of bytes
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

                      SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

                      SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 0]

SendChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ i \notin sentChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks>>

AckChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

RetransmitChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks>>

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : SendChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks : AckChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks : RetransmitChunk(i)
    \/ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks \in SUBSET 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ ackedChunks \in SUBSET 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Nat]
